_comment: Octobots agent registry. Each agent entry is addressable by `monorepo: sdlc-skills` + `name: <subdir>` for entries in the arozumenko/sdlc-skills monorepo, or by `repo: owner/repo` (+ optional `ref`) for third-party agent repos. Optional fields `group` (core|dev|qa), `theme` (tmux styling), and `aliases` (shorthand resolution) drive the install-time selector and runtime display — add them once here and every consumer (select-agents.py, supervisor.py, roles.py) picks them up without code changes.

agents.name: scout
agents.description: Kit — codebase scout and project configurator

agents.name: project-manager
agents.description: Max — orchestrates tasks, routes work, tracks progress

agents.name: ba
agents.description: Alex — requirements, user stories, acceptance criteria

agents.name: tech-lead
agents.description: Rio — technical decomposition, interface design, code review

agents.name: ios-dev
agents.description: Io — iOS/Swift developer (SwiftUI, SwiftData, Swift Testing)
Argus — 13-specialist QA auditor (a11y, security, UX, performance, privacy, mobile, content...)

agents.name: personal-assistant
agents.description: Octo — second-brain personal assistant: signals, knowledge base, open loops

presets.name: iOS development
presets.description: Mobile team — Scout, BA, Tech Lead, PM, iOS dev, QA

presets.name: SDLC team
presets.description: Full delivery team — Scout onboards first, then BA, Tech Lead, PM, Python Dev, JS Dev, QA

presets.name: Personal assistant
presets.description: Solo PA — second-brain / journaling / inbox triage

presets.name: Custom
presets.description: Pick each agent yourself (core roles one-by-one, devs and QA as multi-select)
